title: MStack360 CRM System
summary: End-to-end CRM system managing clients, projects, freelancers, and financial operations in one unified platform.
impact: Centralized client, project, and freelancer management into a single system.
Automated invoice generation and email communication workflows.
Improved visibility on financials, payments, and project performance.
longDescription:
I designed and developed a custom CRM system for MStack360, a freelance-based company where employees operate as freelancers and clients are primarily technical organizations. The solution centralizes the management of clients, employees, projects, tasks, leads, and financial operations into a single unified platform, enabling efficient tracking of work, payments, and client relationships.

The system includes a comprehensive Client Management module providing a 360° view of each client, including project history, active work, payments, and follow-ups. Users can generate invoices directly from the application by adding line items, after which a Power Automate workflow automatically creates a professionally formatted PDF invoice and sends it via email. The platform also integrates a built-in HTML email system to send customized communications to clients.

In addition, the solution features Employee Management, allowing tracking of freelancer performance, workload, payments, and assigned projects. A structured Projects & Tasks module supports milestone tracking and operational follow-up, while the Finance module provides visibility on payments received, payments due, and overall financial status. The system also includes a Follow-Up module to manage client communication and an integrated dashboard to visualize business activity.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, and SharePoint, the CRM significantly reduces manual work, improves operational visibility, and provides a scalable foundation for managing freelance-based business operations.

title: Nestlé HR Digital Solutions
summary: Digitalized the HR request and approval process for Nestlé, integrating automation to reduce manual overhead.
impact: Replaced fragmented manual systems with a centralized HR portal.
Automated approval workflows for over 15,000 employees.

title: Contract Lifecycle Management System
summary: Enterprise contract management platform centralizing procurement workflows from discovery to submission.
impact: Centralized contract operations and reduced reliance on emails and spreadsheets.
Implemented structured workflow across multiple roles (discovery, partner, specialist, submission).
Enabled real-time tracking and reporting of contract lifecycle and team performance.
longDescription:
I am currently developing a Contract Lifecycle Management System for Federon Procurement Solutions, designed to centralize and digitize complex procurement workflows across multiple teams. The platform integrates external contract data into a unified system and manages the full operational lifecycle from initial discovery through internal evaluation, assignment, and submission processes.

The solution supports a structured, role-based workflow involving discovery teams, partners, specialists, and submission teams. Contracts are tracked through multiple stages, enabling clear visibility of their status, ownership, and progression. The system ensures that all actions, updates, and decisions are recorded within a centralized platform, reducing dependency on manual communication and disconnected tools.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, and Power BI, the platform provides role-based interfaces, automated workflows, and real-time dashboards to enhance operational transparency and decision-making. The ongoing vision of the system is to evolve into a fully integrated operations platform, further centralizing procurement activities, performance tracking, and reporting across the entire contract lifecycle.
images: Contract Line Items and Gant Chart.png

title: ASU Employment Fair Registration System
summary: End-to-end event registration and QR-based verification system handling 15,000+ participants.
impact: Managed registration and attendance tracking for over 15,000 participants.
Replaced manual Excel-based processes with a fully automated digital system.
Enabled real-time analytics, filtering, and targeted communication during and after the event.
longDescription:
I developed a smart registration and event management system for the ASU Career Center, designed to handle over 15,000 participants during the Employment Fair. The solution replaced manual Excel-based processes with a fully automated and centralized digital system, improving efficiency, accuracy, and real-time visibility across event operations.

Participants registered through an online form, triggering an automated workflow that generated a unique QR code and sent it via a professionally designed email. During the event, volunteers used a mobile Power Apps application to scan QR codes or search participants using identifiers such as phone number or ID, enabling fast and accurate attendance tracking. The system also supported workshop access control with capacity limitations.

An administrative interface allowed organizers to manage workshops and monitor operations through an interactive dashboard, providing real-time insights before, during, and after the event. Users could filter participant data, export results, and send targeted communications directly from the system. Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, Power BI, Google Sheets, and App Script, the solution significantly improved event management efficiency and enabled data-driven decision-making.

title: ASU Career Center Portal
summary: Centralized student engagement and event tracking for ASU Career Center, providing real-time data insights.
impact: Developed real-time ROI dashboards for career fair sponsors.
Integrated mobile check-in for thousands of students.
longDescription:
At Federon, I was responsible for overhauling the procurement and contract management workflows using the Microsoft Power Platform.

The legacy system relied heavily on manual data entry across disconnected spreadsheets and email threads, which led to frequent errors and slow turnaround times.

By architecting a solution with Power Apps as the front-end interface and Dataverse as the robust back-end, we centralized all request data. I implemented complex Power Automate flows to handle role-based approvals, dynamic email notifications, and SLA tracking.

The final solution not only improved data transparency across the organization but directly optimized the daily operational workflows, drastically reducing administrative overhead.
